title: Linked Lists, Nodes, and Pointer Invariants
description: Build a mutable work queue where stable node links matter more than random access. Learners cumulatively produce a linked structure with diagrammed invariants through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace singly and doubly linked node references without losing head, tail, or reachability.
Insert and delete at boundaries while preserving connectivity and size invariants.
Implement traversal with termination evidence and malformed-cycle protection.
